purpose: Versioned Swiss guidance used for internal quality checks. Sources are not printed in the motivation letter.

rules: Write an individual letter for each role and employer.
Use the contact person when known.
Match strengths to the role and job advertisement.
Explain why this specific employer is relevant.
End with a clear interest in a response or interview.
Keep a human review before PDF submission.
Do not copy the CV; show how the employer benefits.
Make the letter future-oriented.
Use a clear structure and keep it to one page.
Use relevant job-ad keywords naturally.
Be self-confident without exaggeration.
Avoid unnecessary conditional and negative wording.
Prefer short sentences and concrete wording.
Use a subject containing Bewerbung and the concrete role.
Open with specific role and employer motivation.
Select relevant competences and experience instead of listing everything.
Explain the intended contribution to the employer.
Use a concise, direct closing.
Reject generic openings such as Hiermit bewerbe ich mich.
Support strengths with concrete evidence.
Do not repeat job-ad phrases without adding proof or interpretation.
Use a confident call-to-action rather than a weak conditional close.
Build an authentic Hin-zu-Motivation.
Research the employer and refer to a concrete statement or activity.
Avoid generic praise of values or innovation.
Treat generated copy as a draft requiring personal and factual review.

qualityRules.check: The opening and employer motivation contain concrete role- or employer-specific information.
The letter states a plausible contribution or value proposition for the employer.
At least two central claims map to verified or defensible profile evidence.
The letter explains how the candidate intends to contribute or develop in the role.
The rendered output is exactly one A4 page.
The letter does not reproduce long CV passages or list every skill.
The opening does not use blocked serial-letter phrases.
Concrete verbs and examples outweigh unsupported adjectives and nominalisations.
The closing is direct and professional without exaggerated pressure.
The package remains in draft status until Adam explicitly approves it.

blockedPhrasePatterns: Mit grossem Interesse habe ich Ihre Stellenanzeige gelesen
Ich bin überzeugt, dass ich der perfekte Kandidat bin
Schon immer war es mein Traum
